response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (18+ years) with a strong technical background, including roles in engineering productivity and developer tools. His experience with build systems, testing infrastructure, and code review is relevant, but his people management experience is limited to team leadership without clear managerial roles. Mobile platform knowledge is absent, and organizational change leadership is unproven.
strengths: Strong technical leadership and hands-on coding experience in developer tools and infrastructure
Proven track record in creating and optimizing automated systems (e.g., CI/CD, testing frameworks)
Diverse technical expertise across multiple languages, platforms, and industries
concerns: Limited direct people management experience beyond team leadership (no formal HR/performance review responsibilities)
No explicit experience with mobile platforms or organizational change leadership
Recent roles skew toward individual contributor rather than managerial responsibilities
